decisions.rationale: SET-09 anchors admin paths/resources panels with AC-2 requiring grid card templates; shallow ui_refs acceptable at decompose for ~75-entity admin subtree — expand grids, add buttons, and card edit/delete nodes from ir/slices/bTHDl__elements____remaining_children.json at SET-09 implement.

SET-10 anchors three admin sub-tabs and analytics panel; expand ui_refs for admin-plans-grid, admin-workplaces-grid, and stat card ids under ai_RNbBHYay at implement — proportional depth deferred per ui-fidelity rubric for large admin slice.

SET-09/10 AC-2 already require edit/delete card actions matching IR; missing explicit edit-mode popup reuse and delete-confirm ACs are implement workflow detail — add AC-4 per admin item at implement referencing ir/slices/bTHDl__workflows____part_A.json, not decompose item split.

SET-01 AC-3 cites SHELL-02 bTIfa crisis host but SHELL-02 omits bTIfa mount; CRISIS-01 is in depends_on. Resolve at implement: extend SHELL-02 sidebar mount or revise SET-01 AC-3 to reference CRISIS-01 export only — cross-module SHELL gap, not SETTINGS decompose rewrite.

SET-07 layout_notes cite ~42 entities; expand subscription-plans-grid RG cell ui_refs (ai_RNbBHYYo–ai_RNbBHYZA) at implement from bTHDl element slices — anchor ui_refs sufficient at decompose for tab item.

Missing per-item project/ and adapter out-of-scope lines is documentation polish; SET-04 and admin items already forbid project/ writes. Append consistent one-liners at implement kickoff per implementation-constraints — same pattern as JOURNAL/SHELL triage.

summary: Review ok (87% readiness, 0 blockers); first triage for 10-item settings decompose. 0 fix_now, 6 defer, 0 accept. Advance decompose: expand SET-09/10/07 ui_refs and admin workflow ACs at implement, resolve SHELL-02 bTIfa crisis mount cross-module, out-of-scope clauses at kickoff.
